_comment: Generic, secret-free opencode provider config for envforge's coding agent.
Copy to ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json (or point OPENCODE_CONFIG at it).
It defines an OpenAI-compatible provider named 'litellm' that reads its URL
and key from the environment (OPENAI_BASE_URL / OPENAI_API_KEY) at run time,
so NO secrets are stored in this file. Add the model id(s) your endpoint
serves under 'models', then pass --gen-model litellm/<model-id> to envforge.
Works with any OpenAI-compatible endpoint: LiteLLM, vLLM, Ollama, OpenAI, etc.
